expectations.text: Covers all 5 areas (accessibility, best-practices, SEO, performance, CWV)
expectations.evidence: All 5 areas explicitly covered: A. Accessibility (KWCAG2.2) with 33+7 items, B. Best Practices (BP-01 through BP-14), C. SEO (SEO-01 through SEO-10), D. Performance (PERF-01 through PERF-11), E. Core Web Vitals (CWV-01 through CWV-11)
Step 7 titled 'Unified Report' mentions 'HTML + CSV report generation (simulated)' with output path '.claude/try-claude/reports/web-quality/YYYYMMDD-HHmm/'

Follows an explicit 8-step workflow: Step 1 (Review Scope), Steps 2-6 (Five Area Review with delegation to sub-skills), Step 7 (Unified Report), Step 8 (Verification). Also explicitly notes 'Structured 8-step workflow with explicit delegation to 5 sub-skills' in Key Skill Differences section.

eval_feedback.overall: The with_skill run for the English prompt demonstrates full adherence to the web-quality-audit skill structure, with all 5 areas covered using specific checklist IDs, unified report generation, structured 8-step workflow, and a verification step.
